news.headline: Former CFTC commissioner Brian Quintenz may become CFTC chair under Trump, hinting at a pro-crypto stance.
news.summary: Brian Quintenz, who previously served as a commissioner for the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), has been selected by former President Trump to potentially lead the CFTC as its chair. Quintenz, who currently holds the position of policy head at a16z, is seen as an advocate for cryptocurrencies. This appointment suggests a potential shift towards more favorable regulations for the crypto industry.

news.headline: Wall Street to open lower as 117 S&P 500 stocks hit new lows; inflation data raises rate cut probability. Indices' futures trading lower.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures dropped on Thursday after reaching fresh highs. November inflation data met expectations, raising the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut in December to 98.6% from 58.75% a month ago. The 10-year and two-year Treasury notes yielded 4.30% and 4.18% respectively. Major index futures were down: Nasdaq 100 by 0.24%, S&P 500 by 0.16%, Dow Jones by 0.19%, and Russell 2000 by 0.18%. On Wednesday, major indices had positive gains and the Magnificent Seven ETF surged to a new high. Stocks like Roundhill Magnificent Seven ETF and S&P 500 showed positive movement while 117 S&P 500 stocks hit monthly lows.

news.headline: Donald Trump weighing a potential a16z Crypto Policy Head for CFTC role; ex-CFTC comm. oversaw launch of first regulated Bitcoin & Ethereum futures contracts.
news.summary: During Brian Quintenz's tenure as a CFTC commissioner, he supervised the introduction of the initial regulated futures contracts for Bitcoin and Ethereum.

news.headline: Surf Air Mobility expects a 90% decrease in future equity dilution by relying more on debt financing.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Surf Air Mobility Inc. (NYSE: SRFM), a prominent regional air mobility platform, revealed plans to decrease potential future equity dilution by roughly 90%. This initiative is part of the company's new financing approach, which focuses more on debt as opposed to equity funding. In order to achieve this, Surf Air intends to modify the registration statement linked to its share subscription facility with GEM Global Yield LLC ("GEM"). This amendment is expected to have a significant impact on reducing equity dilution for the company.

news.headline: Stantec awarded C$24 million contract to support Toronto’s Gardiner Expressway Rehab Section 4, based on its long-standing ties.
news.summary: A contract worth C$24 million has been secured by Stantec and recently acquired Morrison Hershfield, further solidifying their enduring partnerships with the City of Toronto.

news.headline: AS Tallink Grupp extends Management Board members' terms - Harri Hanschmidt by 3 years from Feb 5, 2025, Piret Mürk-Dubout by 3 years from Apr 16, 2025.
news.summary: The Supervisory Board of AS Tallink Grupp approved extending the terms of office for two members of the Management Board. Mr. Harri Hanschmidt will serve an additional three years beginning February 5, 2025, while Mrs. Piret Mürk-Dubout's term was extended by three years starting from April 16, 2025.

news.headline: In 2025, Bitcoin's price to surge due to 'demand shocks', while altcoins may struggle without US regulations backing crypto adoption.
news.summary: The asset manager stated that without favorable regulatory rules in the United States, altcoins could struggle to gain traction.

news.headline: Olin hosts 2024 Investor Day in NYC, increases Share Repurchase Authorization to $2.0 billion. Live webcast available.
news.summary: Olin Corporation (NYSE: OLN) has scheduled an Investor Day in New York City on December 12, 2024. The event will commence at 9:00am (ET) and is anticipated to finish around 12:00pm (ET). Throughout the Investor Day, a live webcast of the presentation will be available alongside the presentation materials.

news.headline: PHX Minerals Inc. in Fort Worth, Texas, initiates strategic alternatives process to maximize shareholder value.
news.summary: Fort Worth, TX - PHX Minerals Inc. revealed on December 12, 2024, that the Board of Directors has decided to explore strategic options to enhance shareholder value, such as a... The company, traded as PHX on NYSE, aims to make informed decisions for maximum returns.

news.headline: Centene Corp announces 2025 guidance with adjusted EPS >$7.25, revenue forecast of $166.5-$169.5B, and HBR of 88.4%-89%.
news.summary: Centene Corporation reaffirmed its 2024 adjusted diluted EPS guidance of over $6.80 and issued 2025 adjusted diluted EPS guidance of over $7.25, with a 6% year-over-year growth. The company outlined its 2025 financial guidance, including total revenues of $166.5 billion to $169.5 billion, premium and service revenues of $154.0 billion to $156.0 billion, GAAP diluted EPS of over $6.19, HBR of 88.4% to 89.0%, SG&A expense ratio of 8.1% to 8.7%, effective tax rate of 21.5% to 22.5%, and diluted shares outstanding of 491.0 million to 494.0 million. Centene's investor day will start at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The company uses non-GAAP financial measures to help assess its operations and performance consistently. The non-GAAP financial measures exclude amortization of acquired intangible assets, acquisition and divestiture-related expenses, and other items.

news.headline: Empire's Fiscal 2025 Q2 results show EPS of $0.73, adjusted EPS of $0.73, net earnings of $173.4M. Same-store sales increased 1.8%.
news.summary: Empire Company Limited announced its second quarter financial results, reporting a net earnings of $173.4 million ($0.73 per share) compared to $181.1 million ($0.72 per share) in the prior year. Adjusted net earnings were $173.4 million ($0.73 per share) compared to $178.3 million ($0.71 per share) last year. Same-store sales, excluding fuel, increased by 1.8%. The company is focusing on enhancing data capabilities, store renovations, and digital initiatives to drive growth. Sales for the quarter were $7,777.8 million, with a gross margin of 26.5%. Operating income increased by $6.7 million to reach $319.1 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $600.7 million, a $24.1 million increase from the prior year. The company aims to drive efficiency and cost effectiveness through various initiatives. Installments for share repurchases and share price are expected to be key priorities for long-term growth.

news.headline: Brian Quintenz, a16z's policy head and ex-CFTC commissioner, is a top contender for CFTC Chair under Trump, reflecting a pro-crypto stance.
news.summary: Brian Quintenz, a former CFTC commissioner who currently serves as the policy head at a16z, has allegedly been chosen by former President Trump to lead the CFTC. This selection is believed to indicate a shift towards more favorable regulations for cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: Target offers Christmas Eve delivery for orders by 3pm, with Drive Up and Order Pickup by 6pm. Stores open until midnight and 8pm on Christmas Eve.
news.summary: Customers have the option to receive gifts on Christmas Eve with same-day delivery if orders are made by 3 p.m. Additionally, Drive Up and Order Pickup orders placed before 6 p.m. will be ready the same day. The majority of Target stores will be open until midnight leading up to Dec. 23 and until 8 p.m. on Christmas Eve.

news.headline: Canon Middle East and AlNahda collaborate to empower Saudi women in creative sectors through training programs.
news.summary: A new collaborative effort has been established to boost female representation in the creative and printing industries. Through this strategic partnership, a specialized training program will be launched to equip women with essential skills in content creation, photography, and printing. The intensive two-week course will be carried out in conjunction with Abdulwahed (AAW), a key partner of Canon. This initiative aims to empower women and enhance their participation in these sectors by providing thorough training opportunities.

news.headline: PCBs are vital for electronics, connecting components to enable device function. Latest study shows high demand.
news.summary: A recent report from BCC Research in Boston revealed key insights into the essential role of printed circuit boards (PCBs) in modern electronics. These circuit boards serve as the foundation of electronic devices by facilitating connections between various components, allowing for seamless functionality. The study, released on December 12, 2024, emphasized the increasing demand for PCBs on a global scale. The detailed analysis provides valuable information on PCB technologies and their significant presence in the electronics industry.

news.headline: PenFed Foundation awarded Project Opportunity grant to support veteran entrepreneurship training in Maryland, offering alternative employment.
news.summary: A grant has been launched to support veterans by offering an alternative to conventional employment opportunities, allowing them to apply and enhance the skills and training acquired during their active duty service. The initiative was unveiled by The PenFed Foundation, a 501(c)3 organization based in TYSONS, Va., on Dec. 12, 2024.

news.headline: Fulfillment Fund teams up with AscentUP and CareerSpring to offer more resources for students. Los Angeles, Dec.12, 2024.
news.summary: In a collaborative effort, various organizations are teaming up to offer increased resources and assistance to students in Los Angeles. Fulfillment Fund, a local organization focused on helping students from educationally and economically disadvantaged backgrounds achieve their college aspirations, is at the forefront of this initiative. The aim is to provide additional support to these students as they pursue their academic dreams. This partnership comes at a crucial time to address the needs of the youth, with key stakeholders coming together to amplify the impact.

news.headline: Nvidia increases hiring in China for AI-powered vehicles, focusing on autonomous cars. #Bloomberg #Nvidia #AI
Chery Auto releases video showing crash test lab through new dummy's perspective in Wuhu, China. Published on Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: In WUHU, China on December 12, 2024, Chery Auto unveiled an innovative video showcasing its advanced crash test lab. The video, featuring a new "employee" crash test dummy, provides a captivating insight into the company's safety testing procedures. This unconventional approach aims to engage viewers by offering a unique perspective on the rigorous testing processes undergone by vehicles. The video release demonstrates Chery Auto's commitment to transparency and innovation in automotive safety technology, highlighting the importance of ensuring top-notch safety standards in their vehicles.

news.headline: Shareholders' Nomination Board proposes changes at Stora Enso Oyj AGM on 20 Mar 2025. Helsinki, Dec. 12, 2024. #StockExchange #PRNewswire
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, the Shareholders' Nomination Board of Stora Enso Oyj announced its proposal for the Company's Board at the upcoming Annual General Meeting on March 20, 2025. The meeting will take place at 13:00 EET in Helsinki. The proposal includes key decisions regarding the composition of the Board for the following year. This move is a strategic decision made in conjunction with the AGM to ensure proper governance and leadership within the company.

news.headline: Global Variable Frequency Drive Market to reach $30.36 billion by 2029, growing from $23.46 billion in 2024 at a CAGR of 5.3%.
news.summary: A report reveals that the Variable Frequency Drive Market, with an estimated worth of USD 23.46 billion in 2024, is projected to reach USD 30.36 billion by 2029, growing at a CAGR of 5.3%. The surge in the VFD market is attributed to various factors such as...

news.headline: Trimble releases Transportation Pulse Report revealing top priorities for transport industry in Europe and North America.
news.summary: Trimble® (Nasdaq: TRMB) has unveiled the annual Transportation Pulse Report, emphasizing European and North American transportation industry priorities of digitization, cost management, and market growth. The report, released in Westminster, Colo. on Dec. 12, 2024, indicates a strong focus on leveraging technology and optimizing expenses to enhance operations and expand market presence in the industry.

news.headline: Agnico Eagle to buy O3 Mining for $1.67/share in cash, 58% premium, supported by shareholders holding 22% of shares.
news.summary: A recent proposal has been made to acquire O3 Mining at a price of $1.67 per share, which signifies a generous 58% increase from the closing price of the company on December 11, 2024. The offer has received a unanimous recommendation from both the Board and Special Committee of O3 Mining. Additionally, it has garnered support from investors owning 22% of the total outstanding shares of O3 Mining.

news.headline: Integra Resources outlines 2024 drill program at Wildcat Deposit in Nevada, releasing results across infill, geotechnical-metallurgical, and exploration drill. TSXV: ITR; NYSE American: ITRG.
news.summary: Integra Resources Corp., trading as ITR on the TSXV and ITRG on the NYSE American, released results from various drilling activities on December 12, 2024. The company announced findings from infill, geotechnical-metallurgical, and exploration drill programs. For more information, visit www.integraresources.com.

news.headline: TNMP files unopposed settlement for System Resiliency Plan with PUCT, a wholly-owned subsidiary of TXNM Energy.
news.summary: Yesterday, in Albuquerque, New Mexico, TNMP, a subsidiary of TXNM Energy (NYSE: TXNM), submitted an unopposed settlement for approval of a System Resiliency Plan to the Public Utility Commission of Texas (PUCT). The filing outlines TNMP's proposal for enhancing the resiliency of its system.

news.headline: ASP partners with Pool Brain for software to streamline operations in 257 locations across 22 states. #poolindustryinnovation
news.summary: The leading innovator in pool company software, Pool Brain, has recently entered into a new agreement with America's Swimming Pool Company (ASP), the nation's largest swimming pool service franchise. ASP currently operates 257 locations in 22 states. The collaboration between Pool Brain and ASP marks a significant development in the industry.

news.headline: TMX Transform expands services to offer industrial real estate and construction project management in North America.
news.summary: TMX Transform, a top end-to-end supply chain consulting firm for global companies, revealed a new offering today in North America. The firm announced the expansion of its services to include industrial property and development advisory services. This move signifies the company's commitment to providing comprehensive solutions to its clients. The introduction of these services comes as TMX Transform continues to solidify its position as a key player in the industry. This development follows the company's recent growth, with an increasing client base of over x companies, demonstrating a x% increase in demand for their services.

news.headline: Vantage Data Centers issued US$114M bonds in APAC, guaranteed by CGIF, marking significant milestone in financial market.
news.summary: Denver-based Vantage Data Centers recently announced the issuance of bonds totaling US$114 million in the Asia-Pacific region. The bonds are backed by the Credit Guarantee & Investment Facility (CGIF).

news.headline: Global Grease Cartridges Market to reach US$ 487.9 million by 2034, growing at CAGR of 4.6% from US$ 311.2 million in 2024. Rising demand in automotive and industrial sectors due to lubrication needs. East Asia shows fastest growth at 5.5% CAGR. Plastic comprises 69.8% share in materials type segment.
news.summary: The global Grease Cartridges Market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 4.6% from 2024 to 2034, reaching a valuation of US$487.9 million by 2034 from an estimated US$311.2 million in 2024. The market growth is driven by demand from the automotive and industrial sectors, with major applications seen in automotive lubrication for bearings and joints. Technological advancements in designs, such as easy-to-use spouts and eco-friendly lubricants, are boosting market growth. East Asia is exhibiting the fastest growth with a CAGR of 5.5%, and plastic holds the majority share (69.8%) in the material type segment. Despite fluctuating raw material prices, increased focus on maintenance efficiency and green solutions is expected to drive market expansion.

news.headline: Expro collaborates with Petrobras for advancing new flowmeter technology in their latest project.
news.summary: The latest data shows that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 4.7%. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 jobs last month, surpassing analysts' expectations. This boost in job creation has contributed to the overall improvement in the labor market, with many sectors experiencing growth. The decrease in unemployment and the increase in job numbers are positive indicators of economic recovery and stability.

news.headline: Fireweed reports drilling results of 63.54m 6.08% Zinc, 0.89% Lead, 10.7g/t Silver at Boundary Zone; includes 5.13m 30.63% Zinc, 7.83% Lead, 40.3 g/t Silver. 15 holes from Boundary Zone and 9 from exploration drill campaign.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 12, 2024, Fireweed Metals Corp. (referred to as "Fireweed" or the "Company") shared updates on their recent drilling activities. The Company released findings from 15 drill holes conducted at Boundary Zone, along with 9 exploration drill holes as components of the 2024 drill initiative at its Macpass Project, situated in Yukon, Canada. Fireweed Metals Corp. is listed as (TSXV: FWZ; OTCQX: FWEDF).

news.headline: SNB's Chairman Schlegel: SNB negative rates did lessen the franc’s attractiveness.
SNB's Chairman Schlegel: SNB looks at the whole franc situation, not just the euro.
SNB's Chairman Schlegel: SNB will use negative rates again if it has to.
SNB's Chairman Schlegel: SNB doesn't like negative rates but they do work.
Steel Connect reported Q1 fiscal 2025 results: Net revenue $50.5M (↑22%), Net income $2.4M (↓47%), Adjusted EBITDA $7.4M.
news.summary: In New York, Steel Connect, Inc. (NASDAQ: STCN) shared its financial outcomes for the first quarter ended on October 31, 2024. The results revealed a net revenue of $50,487, showcasing a significant increase from the previous year where it was $41,341. Net income for this quarter stood at $2,365, down from $4,436 in the same period a year ago. Net income attributable to common stockholders was reported as $1,828, a decrease from $3,900 in 2023. The company's adjusted EBITDA also saw a notable rise to $7,382 compared to $3,311 in the prior year, with an adjusted EBITDA margin of 14.6% for 2024 as opposed to 8.0% in 2023. Further financial details were not disclosed in the announcement.

news.headline: China’s President Xi vows to facilitate US businesses in China - CCTV.
China’s President Xi: China and the US should choose talk over confrontation - CCTV
Kroger terminates $7.5 billion merger with Albertsons due to antitrust concerns. Shares rise as company plans buyback.
news.summary: Kroger Company (NYSE:KR) saw a rise in premarket trading on Thursday after announcing the termination of its merger agreement with Albertsons Companies, Inc. (NYSE:ACI). This decision came in response to a preliminary injunction from the U.S. District Court in Oregon. U.S. District Judge Adrienne Nelson sided with the U.S. Federal Trade Commission (FTC) in a ruling on Tuesday, contending that the proposed merger violated antitrust laws. The companies had proposed a divestiture plan, including selling hundreds of stores to C&S Wholesale Grocers, to address competition concerns. However, Nelson found this plan insufficient in maintaining adequate market competition. Albertsons subsequently terminated the merger and filed a lawsuit against Kroger. For more details, the complete story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Australian exchange operator fined $5.1M for high-risk margin trading products. ASIC chair cites insufficient investor protection.
news.summary: According to the chair of ASIC, the exchange failed to adequately safeguard investors from being exposed to products that could potentially cause harm due to improper marketing practices.

news.headline: Orban’s Chief of Staff: Hungary's PM Orban proposed a Christmas POW swap between Russia and Ukraine.
Kremlin Press Sec. Peskov: Orban proposed to announce a Christmas truce - TASS.
Shoe Carnival declares $0.135 quarterly dividend and $50M share repurchase program. Board approved on Jan 27, 2025.
news.summary: Shoe Carnival, Inc., a prominent footwear and accessories retailer, disclosed that its Board of Directors has sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend of $0.135 per share, scheduled to be disbursed on January 27, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of January 13, 2025. Moreover, they have approved a fresh share buyback initiative amounting to $50 million of its common stock.
